title: Corpus Hermeticum III: The Sacred Discourse
description: A hymn of cosmic creation: God's glory fills the universe, and the human being is the culmination of creation.
introduction: A hymn of cosmic creation: God's glory fills the universe, and the human being is the culmination of creation.

translation.text: The glory of all things is God. God is mind and nature and matter — the wisdom that reveals all things.
